parameters.query:
=SELECT 
  id,
  revenue_line,
  currency,
  account_type,
  minimum_fee_mean,
  minimum_fee_median,
  maximum_fee_mean,
  maximum_fee_median,
  percentage_fee_mean,
  percentage_fee_median,
  flat_fee_mean,
  flat_fee_median,
  competitors_count,
  last_updated
FROM pricing_analysis 
WHERE revenue_line = '{{ $json.data.revenue_line }}' 
  AND currency = '{{ $json.data.currency }}' 
  AND account_type = '{{ $json.data.account_type }}';

parameters.jsCode:
// Prepare SQL for upsert operation
const data = $json.data;

// Helper function to format SQL values
const formatValue = (value) => {
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return 'NULL';
  if (typeof value === 'number') return value;
  return `'${String(value).replace(/'/g, "''")}'`;
};

const sqlInsert = `
INSERT INTO pricing_analysis (
  revenue_line,
  currency,
  account_type,
  competitors_count,
  minimum_fee_mean,
  minimum_fee_median,
  maximum_fee_mean,
  maximum_fee_median,
  percentage_fee_mean,
  percentage_fee_median,
  flat_fee_mean,
  flat_fee_median,
  active,
  last_updated,
  created_at,
  updated_at
) VALUES (
  ${formatValue(data.revenue_line)},
  ${formatValue(data.currency)},
  ${formatValue(data.account_type)},
  ${data.competitors_count || 0},
  ${formatValue(data.minimum_fee_mean)},
  ${formatValue(data.minimum_fee_median)},
  ${formatValue(data.maximum_fee_mean)},
  ${formatValue(data.maximum_fee_median)},
  ${formatValue(data.percentage_fee_mean)},
  ${formatValue(data.percentage_fee_median)},
  ${formatValue(data.flat_fee_mean)},
  ${formatValue(data.flat_fee_median)},
  true,
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (revenue_line, currency, account_type) 
DO UPDATE SET
  competitors_count = EXCLUDED.competitors_count,
  minimum_fee_mean = EXCLUDED.minimum_fee_mean,
  minimum_fee_median = EXCLUDED.minimum_fee_median,
  maximum_fee_mean = EXCLUDED.maximum_fee_mean,
  maximum_fee_median = EXCLUDED.maximum_fee_median,
  percentage_fee_mean = EXCLUDED.percentage_fee_mean,
  percentage_fee_median = EXCLUDED.percentage_fee_median,
  flat_fee_mean = EXCLUDED.flat_fee_mean,
  flat_fee_median = EXCLUDED.flat_fee_median,
  last_updated = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id, revenue_line, currency, account_type, last_updated;`;

return [{
  json: {
    sql_query: sqlInsert,
    data: data
  }
}];
